title: Deferred Operation Status v1
description: Status payload for an operation previously accepted as deferred-operation.v1. Pending and running statuses keep the caller suspended; terminal statuses either resume with result or end the continuation.

schema.description: Schema tag for deferred operation status payloads.

status.description: Lifecycle status. pending/running suspend processing; completed resumes with result; failed/timed-out/cancelled/expired/unknown are terminal failures unless the parent runtime has an explicit retry policy.

operation/id.description: Id from the initial deferred-operation.v1 payload.

operation/kind.description: Operation class that owns the continuation semantics.

updated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at which this status was produced.

retry_after_seconds.description: Host-clamped lower bound before the next poll/resume attempt. Required by convention for pending/running statuses that are not immediately resumable.

expires_at.description: Current absolute expiry deadline, if still applicable.

causal/context.description: Optional canonical P081 causal context preserved on status and continuation responses.

result.description: Domain result only for completed status. It MUST be validated by the owning operation kind before downstream use.

diagnostics.description: Optional diagnostics for operator and caller visibility.

extensions.description: Open extension map for experimental or deployment-local metadata. Stable protocol fields MUST be promoted to first-class schema properties.
